typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DataTable as string (),
	SchemeId as integer (),
	ValuationDate as timestamp (),
	Cfg_ImportRunId as integer (),
	Cfg_ServiceHostTcpUri as string ()
}

source(output(
		SchemeId as integer,
		ValuationDate as timestamp,
		Namespace as string,
		MarketValue as double
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT      a.SchemeId, a.ValuationDate, f.Namespace,  a.MarketValue FROM            Staging.ChannelAssetTransform AS a INNER JOIN                          Staging.FundDetail AS f ON a.ImportRunId = f.ImportRunId AND a.Namespace = f.Namespace WHERE a.ImportRunId= ? AND a.SchemeId =? AND a.ValuationDate =?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Transform
Transform sink(input(
		SchemeId as integer,
		ValuationDate as timestamp 'ect.format.datetime.hypen.4year2month2day2hour24mmnute2secondsdot6nanoseconds',
		Namespace as string,
		MarketValue as double
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	mapColumn(
		SchemeId,
		ValuationDate,
		Namespace,
		MarketValue)) ~> OutputPlaceHolderScriptComponent
